name: Blue Cheese BLT Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Avocado, peeled, cut into wedges
1 medium Tomato, ripe, cut into wedges
1/2 cup Onion, sliced 1/8 inch thick, separated into rings
1 can (11 oz.) Mandarin orange segments, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, stir together all dressing ingredients.
2. On a platter or individual salad plates, place lettuce.
3. Arrange avocado, tomato, onion, and mandarin orange segments on lettuce; sprinkle with blue cheese and bacon.
4. Pour dressing over salad.
Yield: 6 servings.
